items.title: Obstructing vehicle
items.description: A car is blocking your exit, a delivery or an access point. You're in a hurry but have no way to reach the owner.
items.sans: Waiting, stress, delays. You're at the mercy of chance.
items.avec: One scan is enough to alert the driver. They're notified immediately and can move their vehicle.

items.title: Residential parking space
items.description: Someone is parked in your private spot when you get home. You can't park, and there's no one to contact.
items.sans: You drive around, wait, or park elsewhere. Tension with neighbours, no way to act quickly.
items.avec: You scan and immediately contact the owner. Resolved in minutes, without conflict.

items.title: Company fleet
items.description: A fleet vehicle comes back with a dent. No one knows where or when it happened.
items.sans: Internal dispute, difficult insurance claims, cost absorbed by the company.
items.avec: Every incident is timestamped, geolocated and automatically documented.

howItWorks.title: How does NotifCar work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. A few seconds. Zero hassle.

steps.title: Stick your QR code
steps.description: When you sign up, you receive a unique NotifCar QR code. Stick it on your windshield — discreet and weather-resistant.

steps.title: A passer-by scans the QR code
steps.description: Anyone can scan the NotifCar QR code with their phone, without downloading an app. They choose a reason and send the alert anonymously.

steps.title: You're alerted immediately
steps.description: You receive a push notification in under 3 seconds with the reason for the report, the exact address and the time — wherever you are.

details.title: < 3 seconds
details.desc: Alert received in real time, anywhere in the world.

features.title: Everything you need with NotifCar
features.subtitle: Designed to be simple to use, powerful in an incident.

items.title: Real-time alerts
items.desc: Push notification in under 3 seconds as soon as a report is made, wherever you are.

items.title: Full anonymity
items.desc: Passers-by report without creating an account. No personal data collected from the reporter.

items.title: Precise geolocation
items.desc: Exact address and GPS coordinates of the report, stored in your incident history.

items.title: Automatic report
items.desc: Every incident generates a complete timestamped report ready to send to your insurer in one click.

items.title: Unique QR code
items.desc: A discreet personal QR code, weather-resistant, ready to scan without an app.

items.title: Secure data
items.desc: Hosted in France, end-to-end encryption. Your data is never sold.

profiles.title: Tailored to each profile
profiles.subtitle: Individual, professional or institutional — NotifCar adapts to your reality.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about NotifCar

items.question: How does NotifCar work?
items.answer: Simply scan the QR code on a vehicle. You can then send an anonymous, secure alert to the owner (e.g. lights left on, obstructing vehicle, etc.). No personal data is exchanged — everything goes through the app.

items.question: Why NotifCar?
items.answer: NotifCar makes it easy for drivers to communicate in case of an emergency or obstruction, without direct contact. It's a simple, respectful act of mutual aid.

items.question: Do I need an account to send an alert?
items.answer: No. Scanning a QR code lets you send an alert without mandatory registration. The owner receives the alert via their secure account.

items.question: Can I use it if I don't have a car?
items.answer: Yes! You can always scan a QR code and notify a driver if needed. NotifCar is built on community solidarity.

items.question: Does NotifCar collect my location data?
items.answer: No. We don't track your position in real time. Only the voluntary QR scan triggers an exchange.

items.question: Is the app free?
items.answer: NotifCar offers a free version at launch so everyone can discover the concept. A Premium plan will follow to enhance the experience (instant messaging, alert history, vehicle profile customisation…).

items.question: What if my QR code is stolen or copied?
items.answer: You can deactivate or regenerate your QR code from your user account in one click.

items.question: Which devices will NotifCar be available on?
items.answer: NotifCar will be available on iOS and Android at launch. A progressive web app (PWA) is also planned for access without installation.

footer.description: NotifCar protects your vehicle 24/7 with an anonymous QR code alert system. Simple, fast, secure.

pricing.title: Simple. Transparent.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Scale as you need. No commitment, no surprises.

plans.name: Premium
plans.desc: Full protection for individuals. Launch price — will be €7.99/mo.

pricingFaqs.q: Can I change plans at any time?
pricingFaqs.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your subscription at any time. Billing is adjusted on a pro-rata basis.
7-day free trial on the Premium plan, no credit card required. Full access to all features during that period.
With annual billing, you save 25% compared to monthly. You're billed once for 12 months.

pricingFaqs.q: What's included in the Enterprise plan?
pricingFaqs.a: Unlimited access, centralised dashboard, automated reports and possible API integration. Custom pricing based on your needs.
Hosted in France, end-to-end encryption, GDPR compliant. Your data is never sold.

privacy.heroSubtitle: Information on the collection, use and protection of your personal data.
privacy.intro: This policy informs you about how we collect, use, store and protect your personal data, in compliance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act.
privacy.art1Body:
NOTIFCAR — Simplified joint-stock company (SAS)
Share capital: €500
Registered office: 78 Avenue des Champs-Élysées, 75008 Paris, France
SIREN: 100 680 594
privacy.art2Body: This policy applies to all processing carried out in the context of:
privacy.art2B1: use of the Notifcar application and website
privacy.art3B1_1: First and last name, possible username
privacy.art3B2_2: Apple Sign-In or Google Sign-In identifier
privacy.art3B3_1: QR code identifier and associated vehicle information
privacy.art3B3_2: Content of alerts or reports sent
privacy.art3B4_2: Device type, operating system, application version
privacy.art3B5_2: Notification preferences, send or receive status
privacy.art3Body6: Payments are processed by Stripe. Notifcar does not retain complete banking data when processed directly by this provider.
privacy.art3Body7: Notifcar uses Google Analytics to measure audience and improve the user experience.
privacy.art4B2: Enable use of the Notifcar service
privacy.art4B3: Associate a QR code with a vehicle
privacy.art4B6: Secure the application and prevent fraud
privacy.art4B7: Improve the application and ensure maintenance
privacy.art4B10: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.art5Body1: Account creation, use of services, sending notifications, subscription management.
privacy.art5Body2: Platform security, fraud prevention, service improvement.
privacy.art6Body: Some data is required to create an account, use the service, receive notifications or secure the application. Without this data, certain Notifcar features may be unavailable.
privacy.art7B7: Administrative or judicial authorities if required by law
privacy.art9Body: Data is hosted by IONOS. Notifcar implements the necessary measures to ensure confidentiality, integrity and availability of data.
privacy.art10Body: Notifcar implements technical and organisational measures to protect data:
privacy.art11Body: Through the use of certain providers (Google Analytics, Stripe, Apple, Google), some data may be transferred outside the European Union. These transfers are governed by legal mechanisms compliant with the GDPR.
privacy.art12Body1: The application or website may use cookies or SDKs to:
privacy.art12B1: Ensure the service operates and connections are secure
privacy.art12B2: Measure audience and improve the user experience
privacy.art12Body2: Where necessary, the user's consent is obtained.
privacy.art13Body1: Notifcar may send push notifications to inform you:
privacy.art13B1: Of a report concerning your vehicle
privacy.art13B2: Of an alert or event related to your account
privacy.art13Body2: You can disable these notifications at any time in your device settings.
privacy.art14Title: Article 14 — Login via Apple or Google
privacy.art14Body: You can create an account via Apple Sign-In or Google Sign-In. In this context, some data may be transmitted to Notifcar by these authentication services.
privacy.art15Body1: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.art15B1: Right of access, rectification and erasure
privacy.art15B2: Right to restriction of processing and objection
privacy.art15B3: Right to data portability and withdrawal of consent
privacy.art15Body2:
Any request can be sent to:
contact@notifcar.fr
privacy.art16Body:
You may lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

In France:
CNIL – Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés
www.cnil.fr
privacy.art17Body: Notifcar reserves the right to modify this policy at any time. The applicable version is the one published in the application or on the website.

cgu.heroSubtitle: Rules for using the Notifcar service, subscriptions, liability and applicable law.
cgu.s1Body: By downloading and using the Notifcar application, you unconditionally accept these terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the application.
cgu.s2Body: Notifcar is a mobile application that allows vehicle owners to be alerted when needed via a QR code placed on their vehicle. The service includes vehicle management, notification reception and a messaging system between drivers.
cgu.s3Body: To use Notifcar, you must create an account with a valid email address. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and all activities carried out from your account. Any fraudulent use must be reported immediately.
cgu.s4Body: You agree to use Notifcar only for legitimate and lawful purposes. It is prohibited to use the application to harass other users, spread illegal content, attempt to compromise the security of the service, or for unauthorised commercial purposes.
cgu.s5Body: The Notifcar application, its logo, interfaces, texts and features are the exclusive property of their creators and are protected by intellectual property laws. Any unauthorised reproduction is prohibited.
cgu.s6Body: Some Notifcar features are subject to a paid subscription. Prices are clearly displayed in the application. Subscriptions are billed via Stripe and can be cancelled at any time from your subscriber account.
cgu.s7Body: Notifcar shall not be liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the subscription over the last 12 months.
cgu.s8Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication in the application. Continued use of Notifcar after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
cgu.s9Body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or execution will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.
cgu.s10Body: For any questions regarding these terms, you can contact us at: contact@notifcar.fr
